description: A customer's accounting department needs a PDF copy of an invoice from 6 months ago.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the user and confirm they have billing permissions.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the user is an account admin.

nodes.task_description: Locate the specific invoice from 6 months ago in the billing history.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct historical invoice.

nodes.task_description: Download the invoice as a PDF and email it to the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the requested invoice.
